data.description: Today in Geneva, New York, on May 1, 2026, a recently published article by HelloNation offers advice on how to effectively assist loved ones who may be victims of domestic violence. When concerned individuals suspect a family member or friend is facing abuse, it can be vital to know the most appropriate ways to provide support. Family Counseling Expert provides valuable insights in the HelloNation article on navigating these challenging situations.

data.description: In Newark, Ohio, on May 1, 2026, a new article titled "Are You Ready to List? Try This Home Prep Checklist" offers guidance on steps sellers should take before listing a home to appeal to serious buyers and secure strong offers. data.title: In HelloNation, Dog Daycare Expert Annette Caporusso Details Dog Daycare Cost in Eau Claire and What Drives Pricing Differences
data.description: In Eau Claire, Wisconsin on May 1, 2026, a recent study on dog daycare pricing sheds light on crucial factors influencing costs for pet owners. This analysis aims to assist in budgeting appropriately and selecting the optimal facility for their pets. The study delves into the average cost of dog daycare services in Eau Claire, revealing a range spanning from $25 to $50 per day. Variances in pricing are driven by factors such as the facility's amenities, staff qualifications, location, and additional services offered. Understanding these determinants can empower pet owners to make informed decisions when choosing a daycare center for their beloved animals.

data.title: Santa Cruz Software Completes SOC 2 Type II Audit, Strengthening Security Assurance for Enterprise Customers
data.description: Santa Cruz Software is demonstrating its dedication to safeguarding customer data and meeting enterprise procurement standards. The company, based in Santa Cruz, California, confirmed on May 1, 2026, that it has recently passed a SOC 2 Type II audit. This achievement showcases the company's commitment to ensuring the security and privacy of customer information.

data.title: ZETA SURGICAL® Receives FDA 510(k) Clearance Expanding Access to Brain Tumor Biopsies, Hydrocephalus, and Trigeminal Neuralgia
data.description: Today, ZETA SURGICAL revealed that their Zeta Navigation System, in addition to its navigated tools - Zeta Stylet and Zeta Bolt, has obtained 510(k) clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. This device falls under Class II classification as per the latest announcement.

data.title: I AM ALS Ignites Nationwide Shift in ALS Visibility Launching Landmark Film, Celebrity PSA, and Elevating Thousands of Community Stories for Awareness Month
data.description: Launching today, the 'Every Flag Has a Story' campaign by I AM ALS aims to raise awareness and mobilize community support for those affected by ALS. The initiative focuses on showcasing the personal stories of individuals facing ALS to emphasize the urgency of the situation. This community-driven campaign seeks to highlight the human side of ALS and encourage collective action.

data.title: AmeriGas® Hosts Philly 250 Forum, Bringing Together Philadelphia's Civic and Sports Leaders Ahead of the City's Historic Summer
data.description: A leading retail propane distributor, AmeriGas Propane, L.P., a subsidiary of UGI Corporation (NYSE: UGI), is highlighting Philadelphia's upcoming summer events for its employees. As the title sponsor of the Philadelphia Cycling Classic, the company hosted key leaders at its King of Prussia headquarters to discuss significant events in 2026, including the FIFA World Cup. With its prominent presence in the industry, AmeriGas continues to engage with civic, tourism, and sports sectors to bring excitement to the city.

data.title: Justin Boots Launches Prodigy Collection
data.description: In FORT WORTH, Texas, on May 1, 2026, Justin Boots unveiled the Prodigy Collection, a cutting-edge series of work boots designed for modern workers seeking agility, durability, and fashion. This new line targets the evolving workforce that values both style and functionality, catering to individuals who prioritize performance in their work gear.

data.title: Bitdeer Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for May 14th 2026
data.description: Bitdeer Technologies Group (Nasdaq: BTDR) announced its plans for the first quarter 2026 earnings conference call and webcast, set for Thursday, May 14, 2026 at 8:00 AM EST. The company, a leader in Bitcoin mining and AI infrastructure, will reveal unaudited financial and operational results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, during the call. Bitdeer management will provide insights and engage in a Q&A session as part of the event.

data.title: ARC Group Acquisition I Corp Announces Closing of $120,750,000 Initial Public Offering
data.description: On May 1, 2026, ARC Group Acquisition I Corp (NASDAQ: ARCL) successfully completed its initial public offering by selling 12,075,000 units at $10.00 each. This included 1,575,000 units exercised through the underwriters' over-allotment option in full. The total gross proceeds from this offering amounted to $120,750,000.
